smoke.detail: pixi run pytest endpoints/synthesizability/test_aggregate.py -q -> 20 passed in 0.06s (core env, no box/GPU).

note: synthesizability aggregator reports an escalating-rigor TIER (easy<likely<confirmed; hard=negative) from SAscore->RAscore->is_solved; raw ladder surfaced, never fused into one scalar; SAscore inversion honored; reads is_solved not solved.
